prestazioni: M50dB30 (B57D30T0) 3.0L inline-6 diesel engine: BorgWarner EFR 8374 turbocharger upgrade with billet compressor wheel (62mm inducer, 83mm exducer) and titanium-aluminide turbine wheel, paired with a custom 4-inch V-band downpipe and a CSF Race intercooler (part #8216) for sustained 550whp and 800Nm torque on E85 blend

Dinan Engineering Stage 4 ECU/TCU flash with custom DME mapping for the B57D30T0, including optimized fueling for E85 (1000cc injectors from Injector Dynamics ID1700x), upgraded CP4.2 high-pressure fuel pump, and a Motec M150 ECU piggyback for real-time tuning adjustments

KW Suspension Clubsport coilovers (3-way adjustable, part #3V0 30-015) with custom valving for the G05 X5’s air spring delete, paired with H&R 25mm front and 20mm rear anti-roll bars (part #546 600 00 and #546 601 00) and OEM M Performance rear subframe reinforcement kit (part #51-21-8-254-814)
estetica: Rocket Bunny G05 X5 widebody kit (Pandem #PD-G05X5-WB) with carbon fiber fenders, custom 3-piece forged wheels (BBS FI-R 10.5x22 ET35 front, 12.5x22 ET40 rear) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (295/30/22 front, 325/25/22 rear)

Vorsteiner G05 X5 carbon fiber front lip spoiler (part #V-STEINER-G05-FL) and rear diffuser (part #V-STEINER-G05-RD), paired with a custom Akrapović titanium exhaust system (dual 100mm outlets) and M Performance carbon fiber side skirts (part #51-19-2-458-522)

Custom matte vinyl wrap in BMW Individual Frozen Deep Green (code 354) with gloss black accents on the kidney grilles, mirror caps, and rear diffuser, complemented by OEM M Performance carbon fiber roof (part #51-71-8-254-815) and LED angel eyes from LUX V3 H8 (5500K color temperature)
